data.description: FUTURE MIGRATION — out of contract 9f72697 scope (no AC IDs). Origin: Dependabot PR #50 (typescript 5.9->7.0.2) bulk-merged 2026-07-10, reverted untested in PR #63 (tsx 4.23.0 was kept). TS 7 is the native-port compiler generation — treat as a deliberate migration: verify tsc semantics/flags in tsconfig.json still hold, npm run build output identical in behavior (dist/cli.js drives e2e replay — stale/changed dist changes cassette keys, see MA-29 lesson), vitest 3.2.7 + tsx interop, Biome interop. Gates: tsc clean; fast suite green (npm test, 152 tests, <=60s); full e2e cassette replay green (npm run test:full) with ZERO cassette misses — key stability is the regression signal; npm run lint green. Serialization: package.json (falcon-detective) group — collides with the Biome 2.x migration ticket; one in flight at a time. Size: M.
data.title: Migrate TypeScript 5.9 to 7.x in falcon-detective

provenance.reason: Operator-requested minting of future tickets for the three majors reverted in PR #63
MA-31 picked up after MA-32 reached review; serialized behind PR #68 via stacked branch
TypeScript 7.0.2 migration underway on claude/ma-31-typescript-7 (stacked on claude/ma-32-biome-2x)

data.body: PR opened: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/69 (head efc8a3a, base main, stacked on #68 per package.json serialization — merge #68 first). typescript 5.9.3 -> 7.0.2 (native-port compiler); tsconfig.json/tsconfig.build.json unchanged, zero new TS7 diagnostics. Gates: tsc clean; npm run build emits dist/cli.js; npm run lint clean (Biome 2.5.3 from #68); npm test 152/152; npm run test:full 153/153 with the real e2e replay EXECUTED under E2E_REQUIRED=1 and ZERO cassette misses (TS7-compiled dist keeps cassette keys stable). e2e wall-clock note: cold run-worktree cargo compile races the 360s budget; root-caused and filed as MA-37 (share CARGO_TARGET_DIR) — CI green via rust-cache.

provenance.reason: All ticket gates green; PR #69 awaiting operator merge after #68 (stacked)

data.body: Merged (PR #69, operator-authorized merge commit 8b3439c, mergedAt 2026-07-11T07:53:02Z, base main after #68). falcon-detective now on TypeScript 7.0.2; both CI jobs green on the PR head (Rust; TypeScript build+test incl. E2E_REQUIRED replay — TS7-compiled dist keeps cassette keys stable, zero misses). Replaces reverted Dependabot PR #50 / revert PR #63.

provenance.reason: Operator instructed merge of PR #69; MA-31 complete, CI green both jobs
